Golden Ticket Event - Week 4

I finally took control the economic levers and added an extra $25,000 in Star Atlas loot to week 4 of the Golden Ticket Event! But don't tell anyone...  

Take advantage and try your luck at receiving a Busan Maiden Heart, Armstrong IMP,  Rainbow Arc, and more!  

Submit tickets by
